genre_refs: rogues-gallery / 'Worst of the Week' recurring series
description: A vertical card on a black ribbed background. Seven booking-style photographs are arranged in two rows (four across the top, three near the middle and bottom), each in a thin frame with a dark caption bar naming a crime. Top row labels: 'Kidnapping', 'Murder', 'Drug Trafficking', 'Aggravated Assault'. Lower group labels: 'Child Sexual Exploitation', 'Killing Family Member', 'Larceny'. The subjects are men and women of varying apparent ethnicities. Centered between the rows is a large title in white serif: 'Worst' over 'Week', with 'of the' in white on a red angled banner. Bottom-left is a red banner with the URL 'ice.gov/WoW'; bottom-right is the DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark. The tweet text reads, in part, 'these are the criminal illegal aliens you are standing with.'
notable_text: Worst of the Week; Kidnapping; Murder; Drug Trafficking; Aggravated Assault; Child Sexual Exploitation; Killing Family Member; Larceny; ice.gov/WoW
